heading: JsonDatabase -- Thread-Safe File Storage
body: Instead of PostgreSQL or MongoDB, this project uses a custom file-based database. Each collection is stored as a single JSON file on disk. The `JsonDatabase` class wraps all operations with per-collection thread locks and uses atomic file replacement (write to a .tmp file, then rename) to prevent corruption. This approach gives you zero-dependency data storage that is easy to inspect, version-control, and debug.
